_publications._publicationTitle: Anti-cancer agent 3-bromopyruvate reduces growth of MPNST and inhibits metabolic pathways in a representative in-vitro model.

_contextSnippet: B8γ cells treated with 3-BrPA displayed a reduction of viability only at higher concentrations > 80 μM... PA28y overexpressing cells are partially resistant to 3-BrPA treatment
details: PA28γ overexpressing B8γ cells showed partial resistance to 3-BrPA treatment, with viability reduction only at concentrations >80 μM
